news.title:
Glenmark Pharma gets US FDA approval for Progesterone Vaginal Inserts 100 mg.
Product is bioequivalent to Endometrin; US market sales were $59.2M till Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma gets US FDA approval for Progesterone Vaginal Inserts 100 mg.
Product is bioequivalent to Endometrin; US market sales were $59.2M till Feb 2026.

news.title:
US plans 100% tariff on patented pharma imports may disrupt Indian CDMOs.
Key players like Piramal Pharma, Glenmark, and Sun Pharma could face market uncertainty.
news.summary:
US plans 100% tariff on patented pharma imports may disrupt Indian CDMOs.
Key players like Piramal Pharma, Glenmark, and Sun Pharma could face market uncertainty.

news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma faces GST order for FY 2019-21; Rs. 16.1 Cr demanded as tax with interest and penalty.
The company plans to appeal the order and states no material financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma faces GST order for FY 2019-21; Rs. 16.1 Cr demanded as tax with interest and penalty.
The company plans to appeal the order and states no material financial or operational impact.

news.title:
Glenmark to directly commercialize Ryaltris in the U.S. from April 2026.
Ryaltris, Glenmark's first U.S. product, is now available in 55 countries.
news.summary:
Glenmark to directly commercialize Ryaltris in the U.S. from April 2026.
Ryaltris, Glenmark's first U.S. product, is now available in 55 countries.

news.title:
Glenmark's launch of Glipiq (semaglutide) on 21 March marks its entry into the weight loss market, priced at ₹1,300-1,800/month, boosting accessibility and volumes.
Q3FY26 revenue grew 15% YoY to ₹3,901 crore; Ebitda margin rose to 22% from 18%, driven by specialty products, global brand scaling, and complex generics.
news.summary:
Glenmark's launch of Glipiq (semaglutide) on 21 March marks its entry into the weight loss market, priced at ₹1,300-1,800/month, boosting accessibility and volumes.
Q3FY26 revenue grew 15% YoY to ₹3,901 crore; Ebitda margin rose to 22% from 18%, driven by specialty products, global brand scaling, and complex generics.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
Markets rallied for a second session; Nifty rose 1.7% to 23,306.45, led by realty, metal, and financials.
Stock picks: BSE (Buy, Target ₹3,070), Delhivery (Buy, Target ₹458), Glenmark Pharma (Buy, Target ₹2,330).
news.summary:
Markets rallied for a second session; Nifty rose 1.7% to 23,306.45, led by realty, metal, and financials.
Stock picks: BSE (Buy, Target ₹3,070), Delhivery (Buy, Target ₹458), Glenmark Pharma (Buy, Target ₹2,330).

news.title:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals launches GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India.
The GLP-1 therapy sets a new affordability benchmark with weekly costs starting at ₹325.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals launches GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India.

news.title:
BHEL gains amid momentum in power and capital goods, reflecting positive sentiment.
Glenmark Pharma attracts attention with ongoing interest in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.summary:

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma targets $480M US market with Milnacipran tablets and Fluticasone spray.
These launches balance Rx and OTC growth, leveraging limited competition and US distribution.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma targets $480M US market with Milnacipran tablets and Fluticasone spray.
These launches balance Rx and OTC growth, leveraging limited competition and US distribution.

news.title:
Glenmark's US division launches generic Milnacipran tablets for fibromyalgia.
The product achieved sales of $102.9M for 12 months ending Jan 2026.
news.summary:
Glenmark's US division launches generic Milnacipran tablets for fibromyalgia.
The product achieved sales of $102.9M for 12 months ending Jan 2026.

news.title:
Glenmark launches Milnacipran Hydrochloride tablets in US in 4 dosages.
The product is an authorized generic to Savella, with annual sales of $102.9M.
news.summary:
Glenmark launches Milnacipran Hydrochloride tablets in US in 4 dosages.
The product is an authorized generic to Savella, with annual sales of $102.9M.

news.title:
Glenmark gets USFDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP.
Launch slated for April 2026 in the US; market valued at $384.7M annually.
news.summary:
Glenmark gets USFDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray USP.
Launch slated for April 2026 in the US; market valued at $384.7M annually.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma's US unit to launch potassium phosphates injection USP in March 2026.
The product has annual sales of $50.7M and will be available in various vial sizes.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma's US unit to launch potassium phosphates injection USP in March 2026.
The product has annual sales of $50.7M and will be available in various vial sizes.

news.title:
HSBC keeps Buy on Glenmark, raises TP to Rs 2,600 due to USFDA approval of gFlovent 44mcg inhaler.
Approval boosts US sales; learnings aid gFlovent 110mcg ANDA review with consistent US approvals driving growth.
news.summary:
HSBC keeps Buy on Glenmark, raises TP to Rs 2,600 due to USFDA approval of gFlovent 44mcg inhaler.
Approval boosts US sales; learnings aid gFlovent 110mcg ANDA review with consistent US approvals driving growth.

news.title:
Glenmark gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Aerosol USP 44 mcg with 180-day CGT exclusivity.
The drug is bioequivalent to GSK's FloVent HFA 44 mcg, with US sales of $520.1M annually.
news.summary:
Glenmark gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Aerosol USP 44 mcg with 180-day CGT exclusivity.
The drug is bioequivalent to GSK's FloVent HFA 44 mcg, with US sales of $520.1M annually.

news.title:
Glenmark USA plans to launch Sodium Phosphates Injection in April 2026.
The injection, bioequivalent to Hospira's drug, targets a $66.8M US market.
news.summary:
Glenmark USA plans to launch Sodium Phosphates Injection in April 2026.
The injection, bioequivalent to Hospira's drug, targets a $66.8M US market.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.
They highlighted growth from targeting neglected therapies to leveraging India's epidemiological shift.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma projects 23% core margins by FY27, driven by India growth, US launches, and EU expansion.
Company targets debt-free status by March, with disciplined R&D spends and strategic partnerships aiding growth.
news.summary:
